BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_NONINTERACTIVE.description: Set to 1 to install ghcup silently without prompts. Default is 1 in this bootstrap.

BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_MINIMAL.description: Set to 1 to install only ghcup (no GHC, cabal, etc. by default). Default is 1.

BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_INSTALL_HLS.description: Set to 1 to also install Haskell Language Server.

GHCUP_VERSION.description: Specific version of ghcup to install.
